post.summary: Execute a product AI chat task.
post.description:
**Capability:** `catalog` · **Policy:** `Catalog:AiTask` · **Access depth:** `WorkflowTask` · **Release stage:** `GenerallyAvailable` · **Release-gated:** yes · **Idempotent:** yes · **Async job:** yes · **Workload:** `AiTaskExecution`

Creates a platform job, runs the AI chat via ProductAIChatManager, records usage.

Resolves the public product Guid to the tenant-scoped item id, creates a platform job, executes the product AI chat workflow, records AI usage, and returns a TaskResult.

This is the Day 30 gate deliverable — full v2 pipeline:
[Authorize] → PlatformContext from JWT → composite policy → task → AiAssistManager → job → usage ledger → audit.

DTools.Cloud.SearchApi.FacetResultItem.description: Facet result item with count for building filter UI.

DTools.Cloud.SearchApi.LibraryProductSea.description: Filter definition for product search with support for comparison operators.

searchText.description:
The search query text. Can be empty for browse-all or filter-only scenarios.
Supports automatic filter extraction from natural language:
- Price: "under $500", "between 100 and 200", "around 5k"
- Brand: brand:Sony or brand:"Sony Electronics"
- Category: category:Projectors or category:"Video Projectors"
- Supplier: supplier:"Acme Corp" or supplier:123
- Status: discontinued, active, available
- Type: partner brand
Maximum length: 800 characters

searchMode.description:
Search mode determining the search algorithm used.
Options: Keyword (1), Vector (2), Semantic (3), Hybrid (4), HybridSemantic (5)
Default: Keyword

filters.description:
List of filters to apply to search results.
Multiple filters for the same field are OR-ed; different fields are AND-ed.
Supported fields: BrandName, CategoryName, ParentCategoryName, SupplierIds,
SupplierDtins, IsDiscontinued, IsPartnerBrand, HasMsrp, HasSuppliers, PopularityScore

selectFields.description:
Specific fields to include in the results. If null or empty, default fields are returned.
Available fields: Dtin, Name, BrandName, Model, PartNumber, ShortDescription,
CategoryName, ParentCategoryName, ImageUrl, Msrp, MsrpUom, IsPartnerBrand, IsDiscontinued
Use "Msrp" to include country-specific pricing based on Country parameter.

orderBy.description:
Sort expressions for result ordering (e.g., "Name asc", "Msrp desc").
If empty, results are sorted by relevance score.
Note: Sorting is only available in Keyword mode. Other modes use relevance-based ranking.

pageNumber.description: Current page number (1-based). Valid range: 1-250. Default: 1

pageSize.description:
Number of results per page. Valid range: 1-250. Default: 30
Note: Hybrid modes automatically adjust to minimum of 50 for optimal RRF fusion.

includeFacets.description:
Whether to include facet counts in the response for filtering UI.
Facets include: BrandName, CategoryName, ParentCategoryName, IsDiscontinued,
IsPartnerBrand, HasMsrp, HasSuppliers, and country-specific MSRP ranges.

includeSemanticMetadata.description:
Include semantic answers and captions in response.
Only applicable for Semantic, Vector, Hybrid, and HybridSemantic modes.
Adds AI-generated explanations of why results are relevant.

country.description:
Country/region code for localized pricing and facets.
Supported values: US, CA, GB, AU, NZ
Determines which MSRP field is returned (USMsrp, CAMsrp, GBMsrp, AUMsrp, NZMsrp).
Default: US

DTools.Cloud.SearchApi.LibraryProductSea.description:
Request model for product search operations.
Supports multiple search modes, filters, pagination, and faceted navigation.

totalCount.description: Total number of matching products across all pages.

results.description: List of products for the current page.

facets.description:
Facet aggregations for building filter UI (only when IncludeFacets is true).
Keys: BrandName, CategoryName, ParentCategoryName, IsDiscontinued, IsPartnerBrand,
HasMsrp, HasSuppliers, and MSRP ranges (e.g., "USMsrp")

semanticAnswers.description:
AI-generated answers to the search query extracted from indexed content.
Only available when Semantic or HybridSemantic mode is used with IncludeSemanticMetadata=true.

queryClassification.description:
Query classification determined by the search engine.
Values: "ExactIdentifier", "BrandModel", "NaturalLanguage", "Generic".
Useful for client-side diagnostics and observability.

DTools.Cloud.SearchApi.LibraryProductSea.description:
Response model for product search operations.
Contains search results, facets, and optional semantic metadata.

msrp.description: Country-specific MSRP based on the Country parameter in the request.

msrpUom.description: Unit of measure for the MSRP (e.g., "EA" = Each, "PR" = Pair, "BX" = Box).

isPartnerBrand.description: Whether this is a partner brand product.

isBestseller.description: Whether this product is popular (PopularityScore > threshold).

isPopular.description: Whether this product is popular (PopularityScore > threshold).

semanticCaptions.description:
Contextual snippets showing why this product matched the query.
Only available when semantic modes are used with IncludeSemanticMetadata=true.

DTools.Cloud.SearchApi.LibraryProductSea.description: Represents a single product in search results.

suggestionText.description: The suggested search text (what the user should search for).

suggestions.description: List of product suggestions matching the partial query.

text.description: The answer text extracted from indexed content (plain text).

score.description: Confidence score (0.0 to 1.0, higher is more confident).

highlights.description: HTML-highlighted version with key terms emphasized using em tags.

key.description: The key of the document the answer was extracted from.

DTools.Cloud.SearchApi.SemanticAnswer.description: Represents an AI-generated answer extracted from search results.

text.description: Caption text extracted from product content (plain text).

highlights.description: HTML-highlighted version with key terms emphasized using em tags. Example: "Sony 4K projector with HDR support"

DTools.Cloud.SearchApi.SemanticCaption.description: Represents a semantic caption highlighting query relevance.

bearerAuth.description: Entra External ID (CIAM) access token. See the Authentication guide for how to obtain one (device-code via the CLI, or your own OAuth flow).
